message:
fix: Windows build - handle process IDs as pointers not integers

Fixed daemon.zig for Windows compatibility:

Line 174-180: getPid() print - use {any} on Windows, {d} on POSIX
Line 194-197: child.id print - use {any} on Windows, {d} on POSIX
Line 110-111: getPid() return null on Windows (daemon not supported)

Root cause: On Windows, std.process.Child.Id is HANDLE (*anyopaque),
not an integer like on POSIX. Cannot parse process handles from strings,
so daemon feature is disabled on Windows.

This fixes the Windows CI build error:
  error: invalid format string 'd' for type '*anyopaque'
  at daemon.zig:174 and daemon.zig:185
